title: How do I automate a past due date

posts.author: rfresh737 (Ralph Freshour)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to create an automation where by if the due date is passed, move the item to another group. I can’t seem to get the automation to trigger at all.

It’s 6:30 am now and I set it for 6am but it doesn’t fire. I set the item date to yesterday and it doesn’t fire. Everything I’ve tried does not trigger/fire the script.

Thank you for any help.
